message:
fix(service): enforce single-use readiness contracts and prevent stranded reservations

LoadShed: Add `ready_observed` field that tracks whether `poll_ready()`
was called before `call()`. Each successful `poll_ready` authorizes
exactly one subsequent `call`; calling without prior readiness observation
returns `LoadShedError::NotReady` (fail-closed). Clone explicitly resets
`ready_observed: false` so cloned handles cannot inherit another handle's
readiness window. New tests: call_without_poll_ready, ready_window_consumed,
clone_does_not_inherit_ready_window.

ConcurrencyLimit: Reorder poll_ready to acquire the outer semaphore permit
BEFORE polling the inner service. Previously, inner `poll_ready` was called
first, which could strand stateful inner reservations while the limiter
waited on its own semaphore. When inner readiness returns Pending after
permit acquisition, the permit is now released back (State::Idle) so outer
capacity is not held while waiting on inner readiness. Renamed test to
reflect new behavior, added `CountingReadyService` test helper and
`outer_capacity_wait_does_not_poll_inner_ready_service` test proving inner
service is not polled until outer capacity is available.

RateLimit: Minor test hygiene — derive Clone+Copy on EchoService, suppress
redundant_clone lint on clone test, add assertion using original after clone.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
